character.name: # THE PSYKER ## Official
character.prompt: # THE PSYKER ## Official D&D 2024 Format - Version 3.5.1  *A robed mystic stands amidst ancient ruins, their eyes glowing with psionic light. They don't cast spells—they bend reality through sheer force of will. By partitioning their consciousness into multiple mental Foci, a Psyker can simultaneously crush a foe with psychic force, shield an ally with projected barriers, and communicate telepathically across the battlefield, all while their mind burns under immense psychic strain.*
